query:
-- Post LinkedIn di oggi 25 marzo
SELECT slot, section, dateLabel, linkedinUrl, createdAt
FROM linkedin_posts
WHERE DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE()
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;

-- Canali aggiornati oggi 25 marzo
SELECT section, COUNT(*) as notizie, MAX(publishedAt) as ultimo_aggiornamento
FROM news_items
WHERE DATE(publishedAt) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY section;
